claim_boundary: Sequence/developability QC and VHH monomer structure predictions only; not PVRIG binding, affinity, docking, competition, or experimental blocking evidence.

TNP_NUMBERING_HARD_FAIL_NA.required_evidence: original null JSON plus V2 frozen-command rc=1 log containing TNP could not number and no numeric imputation

UPSTREAM_L2_HARD_FAIL_NA.required_evidence: L1 PASS, L2 FAIL, no TNP JSON and no numeric imputation

VALID_TNP.required_evidence: non-null ID-bound schema-valid TNP payload with numeric PSH/PPC/PNC

igfold_policy.completed_pdbs: validate and byte-freeze when ID, sequence FASTA, command exit, and CA coverage pass
igfold_policy.missing_pdbs: run direct IgFold prediction with one model on GPUs 0-3, then apply the same validation

na_policy: For both NA states all TNP flag and numeric columns remain empty strings; the categorical tnp_supervision_state carries the evidence. The string NA and numeric sentinels are forbidden.
nfs_policy: The frozen old NFS process identity guard must pass before structure supplementation, publication, and terminal receipts. No SIGCONT and no NFS sync-back are allowed.
publication_policy: Build and verify the honest 100-row compatibility delivery, then capture each payload once into an immutable content-addressed /data1 delivery; link SSD_DELIVERY_PUBLICATION.json last, write the canonical recovery receipt with O_EXCL, and finally write the path-switch receipt with O_EXCL.
